item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-email-address","requestedField":"email_address","summary":"The OpenAPI schema is the source of truth and the checked-in TypeScript client is deterministic output. I found that non-required schema properties are already rendered with `?`, so this only needs the schema addition followed by regeneration; I’ll also strengthen the client test to exercise both presence and omission.","commandsRun":["pwd and repository file discovery","inspected package scripts, OpenAPI schema, generator, tests, generated client, and exports"]}

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-email-address","requestedField":"email_address","summary":"The schema and focused type-usage test are updated. The package’s `tsx` CLI hit a sandbox IPC restriction (`listen EPERM`), so I’m invoking the same generator through Node’s `--import tsx` path, which avoids that CLI socket while using the repository’s own code.","commandsRun":["git status --short and scoped diff check","applied schema and test updates","pnpm run generate:api (blocked by sandbox IPC restriction)"]}

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'before=$(shasum -a 256 generated/api-client.ts | cut -d '"' ' -f 1)
node --import tsx scripts/generate-client.ts
then="'$(shasum -a 256 generated/api-client.ts | cut -d '"' ' -f 1)
test \""'$before" = "$then"
git diff --check
git status --short
git diff --stat'

/bin/zsh -lc 'before=$(shasum -a 256 generated/api-client.ts | cut -d '"' ' -f 1)
node --import tsx scripts/generate-client.ts
then="'$(shasum -a 256 generated/api-client.ts | cut -d '"' ' -f 1)
test \""'$before" = "$then"
git diff --check
git status --short
git diff --stat'
